name: career-command-centre
description: A free, evidence-safe career partner for selective job search, CV review, Word application packs and application follow-through using the user's own ChatGPT plan.

interface.shortDescription: Free career partner for stronger roles and evidence-safe Word CVs.
interface.longDescription: Career Centre has no separate subscription: it uses the user's ChatGPT plan and sends nothing to a publisher-operated CV backend. Upload one or several CVs for a candid first review, selective role recommendations with exact links and salary context, and polished Word application packs. It automatically prepares a portable Career Passport, keeps submission manual, adapts to the candidate's market, and can schedule a calibrated search from the same Work task after the first manual run. A reference Word format is supported only when the user explicitly asks for it.
defaultPrompt: Help me find my next role.
Check whether this job is worth applying for.
Review my CV and show me the strongest next move.
